data.body:
[1/27 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were found to be abusing in-game mechanics to gain an unfair advantage over others

▶ Total number of players banned: 59
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3359637
